creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Kurt,

there hasn't been an update on your problem report [1] for a while. In the
meantime, java/openjdk6 has been updated. Can you still reproduce the
problem you reported, or can this PR be closed?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/138348
